source_pluginization_and_self_upgrade_la.if_missing: loop back to evaluation_validation or loop_or_finish depending on which pluginization artifact is absent
source_pluginization_and_self_upgrade_la.why: pluginization should stay downstream of stable evaluation outputs and should not be reduced to an untracked closing note

probe_activations.trigger_reason: stable term structure, evidence-source preferences, operator mappings, and failure patterns became reusable enough to justify plugin drafting
probe_activations.probe_scope: source-aligned plugin drafting and skill-shell exteriorization only
probe_activations.deepen_when: if repeated later rounds confirm the same reusable structure and justify P0 to P1 promotion

interaction_notes.active_when: the round has stabilized reusable method structure and wants future plugin or skill reuse
interaction_notes.note: Keep plugin drafts distinct from MCP skills, and keep skill-facing interfaces downstream of the plugin draft rather than vice versa.

profile_adjustment_recommendation.adjustment_reason: autonomous deep probing was appropriate because pluginization required proactive crystallization after evaluation had stabilized reusable structure
